TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 15 

A7 = Presumptive payment adjustment 

A8 = Ungroupable DRG 

B1 = Non-covered visits 

B3 = Covered charges (No longer used: 10/16/2003) 

B5 = Coverage/program guidelines were not met or were exceeded. (No longer used: 05/01/2016, This 
code has been replaced by 272 and 273) 

B7 = This provider was not certified/eligible to be paid for this procedure/service on this date of
